summary: Verified and confirmed fragment routing functionality is fully implemented. SMS intake has TAG_PATTERN regex for #task-slug detection, parse_message() prioritizes tags correctly, and fragment_router.py handles all routing scenarios: explicit tags, single interview auto-routing, multiple interview clarification prompts, and no-interview fallback. All test commands verified working correctly.
